positive: An intricate Art Nouveau style illustration of a mythical phoenix rising from stylized flames. Incorporating flowing lines, gold leaf accents, deep jewel tones (emerald, sapphire, amethyst), Alphonse Mucha influence, highly detailed etching.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, cartoon, messy, modern style
